texto: God is already given you the power to crush down the red & white tape says you can't proceed beyond certain places. He's given you the keys to open all the door were been slammed on your face
autor: now is the time to take your very first step towards your dreams and goals.
explicacao: Citação de now is the time to take your very first step towards your dreams and goals. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “God is already given you the power to crush down the red & white tape says you can't proceed beyo…” articula reflexao, euginia-herlihy, given em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
